title: ARC Rooms (The Classrooms)
description: This mod adds some contents like items, monsters, structures from "The Classrooms"
body:
## Wait, Where am I ?
This mod adds some monsters, items, and dimensions related to the video game "The Classrooms".

There are 5 playable rooms and 2 future rooms.

# Playable Rooms
## The Classrooms
![classrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u6k1RvWy/images/02549f674bdbca5f42bf4e0c87d3c06731c3c72a.png)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Exit
 Find the elevator, which leads to The Library Rooms.

### Monster
- Cursed Doll
- Cloaked Figure

</details>



## The Library Rooms
![libraryrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u6k1RvWy/images/214897c7a8b29d7b97af6b044c60512aa693874c.png)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Exit
 After opening the door, the player has to escape through the exit, which leads to an elevator. The elevator will take the player to The Bathrooms.

### Monster
- Screecho the Clown

</details>


## The Bathrooms
![bathrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u6k1RvWy/images/edf5c2343f8f6d46913059d1733ca97872a13960.png)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Exit
 The player first needs to raise the water level by finding and turning on the lever. Then, they will have to find the large room featuring a plank, and jump on it to reach the elevator. It will then take the player to The Darkrooms.

### Monster
- Gangler

</details>


## The Darkrooms
![darkrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u6k1RvWy/images/977b175093ed22a96db4702488545e11b1f42cfc.png)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Exit
 The player first needs to cut off the power. By entering the slide, the player will go to The Poolrooms.

### Monster
- Cursed Doll
- Smiley

</details>


## The Poolrooms
![poolrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u6k1RvWy/images/fd254d434bc6b3d1c903402fd405f695c2d8edf2.png)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Exit
 The first step in achieving that is collecting the Level 1 Keycard, Broken Goggles. These objects spawn on balconies, which can be accessed by slides. After having acquired all 2 items, the player must find the Spiral Stair Room. Then, the player has to push the stone button with Level 1 Keycard, which will break GlassBlock Wall. The staircase leads to the Blast Furnace Room, a room that contains the button required to unlock the gate that blocks the exit. Putting the Broken Goggles inside will transmute them into a Googles. 
 The player can then push the stone button located on the spiral staircase's middle, and leave the room to look for the exit. Once found, they can safely traverse through the mist to reach the back of the iron gate, where they will find a deep pit. Jumping into it leads to the next level, The Playrooms.

### Monster
- Whispering Wyrm

</details>



# Future Rooms
## The Playrooms
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Monster
- Tenant
- Necropede
</details>

## The Kidrooms
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Monster
- Joey

</details>

### Known Bugs
- Level loaded unsuccessfully  :  Please reload the world or use "Reset Level".
